agents.purpose: Find and approve acceptable official job sources.
success_criteria: Every source has a clear official host or ATS feed
Blocked sources are documented before ingestion work starts

agents.purpose: Fetch raw jobs from approved ATS boards and company feeds.
success_criteria: Fetcher handles timeouts without killing the full run
Raw payloads include apply URLs and source metadata

agents.purpose: Normalize jobs into one schema and reject bad extractions.
success_criteria: Salary and duration fields are normalized where present

agents.purpose: Score CVs, mark weak excerpts, and answer user questions from review data.
success_criteria: Review output points to concrete weak areas
Assistant answers are grounded in current review data

agents.purpose: Own the UI, end-to-end flows, and release gate.
success_criteria: App is readable on desktop and mobile
Release build is restarted on tested code
